description.content: Returns a list of all applications in your portfolio. Supports filtering by name, tag, business unit, scan type, policy compliance, and modified date.

query.description: Filter by last modified date (ISO 8601 format)

description.content: Creates a new application profile in the Veracode Platform.
Returns details for a specific application by GUID.
Permanently deletes an application profile and all associated data.
Returns all development sandboxes for a given application.
Creates a new development sandbox for an application.
Returns the policy compliance evaluation status for an application.

The Veracode Applications REST API provides programmatic access to application profiles, sandboxes, and policy evaluations in the Veracode Platform. Enables automation of portfolio management, compliance tracking, and CI/CD integration. Authentication uses HMAC with API ID/key credentials.

Contact Support:
